name: oneidentity/safeguard-mcp
description: Official One Identity Safeguard for Privileged Passwords MCP server with dynamic API discovery.

environmentVariables.name: SAFEGUARD_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Appliance hostname or IP for non-interactive authentication

environmentVariables.name: SAFEGUARD_IGNORE_SSL
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to skip TLS certificate validation

environmentVariables.name: SAFEGUARD_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Appliance hostname or IP (required for container mode)

environmentVariables.name: SAFEGUARD_USER
environmentVariables.description: Username for automation/non-interactive auth; omit to use device-code login

environmentVariables.name: SAFEGUARD_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for automation/non-interactive auth; omit to use device-code login

environmentVariables.name: SAFEGUARD_IGNORE_SSL
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to skip TLS certificate validation
